reviews.review_description: But it is very glitchy. And a mod named “sky” banned me because I did not want to play mod says. But mods are fun to play with! I also don’t like how people punch me. And when I got the game it said that my friend owned the game. It was like “Sharkygtvr owns this game!” I just want to know if that is true . I just want to understand. Why do the skin things by the mirror not work? Why does everyone not like this game? WHY does it say my friend owns this game? What is the discord for I can apply for moderator? A mod said he “applied “ for the stick. ANY IT WAS A VERY FUN AND GOOD GAME TO PLAY. I kinda feel like it’s a knockoff though.
Mods are trash, they will ban you for having a random name
This guy said he was gonna report me for having the name sky he had the stick and got banned for having the name sky if I could I would leave 0 star rating.
Bro I love this game bc like there’s mods and I really like gtag fan games what have mods
When I first got the game a mod and others where telling me to change my name or I’ll ban you but other then that great game

I’m rating this game let me guess 0 STARS,I rated this 0 stars because I was playing with a super Mario suit and I find the owner I was gonna tell him that the game is amazing resist this game because he told me “it was you” in a weird way then my eyes saw his hands with the moderator stick in the report button and the game kicked me… then I join back to see I wasn’t banned after all but I was because the leaderboard was saying “not currently connected to room” but it didint let me join a server 
0 stars
